# Key Activities

## Activity Workplan

| # | Activity | Phase | Lead | Timeline |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Team recruitment | 1 | HR | Jan-Feb 2025 |
| 2 | Platform procurement | 1 | IT | Jan-Mar 2025 |
| 3 | App development | 1 | IT/Vendor | Feb-Jun 2025 |
| 4 | Agent recruitment & training | 1 | Operations | Apr-Jun 2025 |
| 5 | Pilot launch | 2 | Programs | Jul 2025 |
| 6 | Member onboarding | 2 | Sales | Jul 2025-Jun 2026 |
| 7 | Loan disbursement | 2 | Credit | Aug 2025+ |
| 8 | Financial literacy workshops | 2 | Programs | Quarterly |
| 9 | Mid-term evaluation | 2 | M&E | Dec 2025 |
| 10 | Scale-up rollout | 3 | All | Jul 2026 |
| 11 | New product launch | 3 | Products | Jan 2027 |
| 12 | Final evaluation | 3 | M&E | Oct 2027 |

## Critical Path
Activities 2, 3, and 5 are on the critical path - delays in platform procurement or development will delay the pilot launch.
